title: poa mustangensis
intro: Poa mustangensis, also known as Bluebunch Wheatgrass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa mustangensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Poa mustangensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in salves and ointments for topical application.
